title: cross-project scan + HTML matrix renderer + mtime/size cache in perf.mjs
action: Extend skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/perf.mjs with a CROSS-PROJECT scan + HTML matrix, reusing the existing pure aggregators (aggregateUsage, runningTimeMs, detectParallel, walkSubagents, computeMetrics). Add: (1) listProjectDirs(projectsRoot) -> [{dir, encoded}] enumerating top-level dirs under the Claude projects root (readdirSync, skip non-dirs); (2) projectLabel(transcriptFile) -> the real project path by reading the first event carrying a `cwd` string, else the encoded dir name; (3) sessionRollup(transcriptFile, {since}) -> {sessionId, models, running_time_ms, parallel, subagent_models, subagent_count, event_count, started_ms, ended_ms} computed over the full file (or [since, now]); reuse computeMetrics with a wide window; (4) scanProjects(projectsRoot, {cachePath, since, env, homedir}) that enumerates every project dir, and for each top-level <session>.jsonl computes a per-session rollup — using an mtime+size CACHE (a JSON map transcriptPath -> {mtime,size,rollup}); a cache hit whose mtime AND size match is reused, else the file is parsed and the cache entry refreshed; then rolls sessions up PER PROJECT into {project, encoded, sessions, models (summed per-model new/cached/total), running_time_ms, parallel_sessions, subagent_models, first_ms, last_ms, total_tokens} and returns {generated_at, projects:[...sorted by total_tokens desc], totals, cache_stats}; write the updated cache back atomically; (5) scanCachePath(env,homedir) => <globalPerfDir>/cache/scan-cache.json; (6) reportHtmlPath(env,homedir) => <globalPerfDir>/performance.html; (7) renderMatrixHtml(scan) -> a SELF-CONTAINED, theme-aware (light+dark via prefers-color-scheme) HTML string: a summary strip (project count, session count, total tokens, total new/cached, cache% , total active time) and a MATRIX table with one row per project (columns: project, sessions, active time [humanizeMs], total tokens, new, cached, cache%, parallel sessions, models-used list, last active) plus a per-project per-model breakdown; inline CSS/JS only, no external requests, responsive, wide tables scroll inside their own container; (8) writeReport(scan, {env,homedir}) that ensures the dir and writes renderMatrixHtml to reportHtmlPath, returning the path. Keep every function tolerant of missing dirs/files (return empty/zeroed, never throw). Add SYNCHRONOUS tests to test_perf.mjs (append, do not rewrite existing 19): build a fake projects root with 2 project dirs each with 1-2 session transcripts (reuse the existing fixture style), assert scanProjects rolls up per-project token/time/session counts correctly, cache hit path is used on a second call (parse count drops / cache_stats reflects hits), renderMatrixHtml returns a non-empty string containing each project label and is self-contained (no http/https external URLs), and writeReport creates the html file. Prove one assertion is falsifiable then restore.

truths: scanProjects enumerates ALL project dirs under the Claude projects root and rolls sessions up per project (per-model new/cached/total, running time, session + parallel counts).
An mtime+size cache is read and written; a matching entry is reused (cache_stats reflects hits on a repeat scan).
renderMatrixHtml is fully self-contained (inline CSS/JS, no external URLs), theme-aware, one row per project.
Every function tolerates missing dirs/files without throwing.
prohibitions: No external URLs/CDN/fonts in the HTML (self-contained only).
Do NOT import perf.mjs from command-registry.mjs.
Do NOT wire CLI or hook here (that is perf-report-2/3).

trace.outcome: Cross-project scan + HTML matrix in perf.mjs (mtime+size cache cold 3.8s/warm 4ms on 236 real transcripts); test_perf 26/0
trace.verification_evidence: { "deliberate_exceptions": ["New cross-project scanner + HTML matrix on the perf area; no prior behavior. Proof = test_perf 26/0 + real full scan (11 projects/236 sessions/3.8B tokens) rendering self-contained HTML, warm-cache refresh 4ms."] }
trace.verify_output: test_perf: 26 passed, 0 failed (scan/cache/html + existing aggregation); real full scan 11 projects/236 sessions cold 3.8s warm 4ms
